name: ledgr-transcripts
description: Blockchain academic transcript registry — contract + relayer + UI

scripts.setup: npm install && npm --prefix contracts install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n chain,api,web -c blue,green,magenta "npm --prefix contracts run node" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:8545 && npm --prefix contracts run deploy && npm --prefix server start" "npm --prefix client run dev"
